title: Increase UNI/ETH Pool Fee from 0.05% to 0.3%
description: Migrate UNI/ETH pool from the 0.05% fee tier to 0.3% fee tier to improve LP compensation. Current LPs are experiencing impermanent loss that exceeds fee revenue. Higher fee tier would attract more liquidity but may reduce trading volume.

simulationTx.description: Factory.enableFeeAmount(3000, 60) from Uniswap Timelock — will REVERT (0.3% tier already exists)
